Patch Set 7:

Please notice you are adding a binary (truststore) that is >115K, which is more than 10% of the maximum chart size.
This is prone to cause problems in the future to deployment of whole OOF.
Take a look at: https://github.com/helm/helm/issues/1996

Patch Set 7:

Will remove truststore from oom repo when deployment of AAF certificates becomes available.
